CREATE SCHEMA mysch;
CREATE PROCEDURE mysch.load_articles AS BEGIN -- procedure logic here END;
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE mysch.load_articles IS 'proc which reloads the articles from external file article.csv';
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE mysch.load_articles IS NULL;
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE mysch.load_articles IS '';
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE mysch.load_articles IS 'Updated comment on article loading procedure';
CREATE PROCEDURE mysch.process_articles AS BEGIN -- procedure logic here END;
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE mysch.process_articles IS 'Processes articles data.';
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE mysch.process_articles IS 'Efficient processing of articles.';
DROP PROCEDURE mysch.load_articles;
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE mysch.load_articles IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE mysch.articles (id INT, title VARCHAR(255));
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE mysch.process_articles IS 'Deprecated, use load_articles instead.';
CREATE TABLE mysch.authors (id INT, name VARCHAR(255));
CREATE PROCEDURE mysch.combine_articles AS BEGIN -- procedure logic here END;
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE mysch.combine_articles IS 'Combines multiple articles.';
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE mysch.combine_articles IS 'This procedure simplifies article merging.';
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE mysch.combine_articles IS NULL;
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE mysch.load_articles IS 'NULL comment after drop.';
SELECT * FROM mysch.articles WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM mysch.authors WHERE name = 'John Doe');
COMMENT ON PROCEDURE mysch.load_articles IS 'Final comment before dropping.';
DROP PROCEDURE mysch.process_articles;
